creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 192921
py-tox-3.0.0.patch

Hello,

attached is the patch that updates py-tox to 3.0.0.

Changes by upstream:

- https://github.com/tox-dev/tox/compare/2.3.1...3.0.0

Changes to the port:
- added BUILD_DEPENDS
- added devel/py-six to RUN_DEPENDS
- updated TEST_DEPENDS
- changed FLAVOR to PY_FLAVOR
- added option DOCS with target and appropriate dependencies
- refine test target
- updated WWW in pkg-descr


QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.1-RELEASE amd64 + i386) for each py27 + py36 flavor -> OK
- portlint -> OK
- make test for each py27 + py36 flavor -> OK
